final:
module johnson_counter (
        input clk,
        input reset,
        output reg [2:0] johnson);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset)
        johnson <= 3'b000;
    else
        johnson <= {~johnson[0], johnson[2:1]};
end

endmodule
